pgollucci    2010-08-23 04:11:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-unicode Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Unicode string manipulation library for Ruby.  This library is based on UTR #15
  Unicode Normalization Forms[1].
  
  [1] http://www.unicode.org/unicode/reports/tr15/
  
  WWW: http://www.yoshidam.net/unicode.txt
  
  PR:             ports/149160
  Submitted by:   Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey at renatasystems.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4022    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-unicode/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-unicode/pkg-descr (new)
